content:
- Continued bug task .ralph/tasks/bugs/ralph-event-watch-missing-script-path.md from TO BE VERIFIED state.
- Performed deep skeptical verification with 16+ parallel probes of systemd state, unit templates, runtime journals, and repo scripts; changed plan to require %h-based paths and explicit deployed-unit sync verification, then switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented fix: added .ralph/event_watch.sh compatibility daemon, updated .ralph/systemd/ralph-event-watch.service ExecStart/WorkingDirectory to %h/work_mounts/patroni_rewrite/pgtuskmaster_rust, updated .ralph/ralph-status.sh with diagnostic missing ExecStart target check.
- Synced deployed user unit to ~/.config/systemd/user/ralph-event-watch.service, daemon-reloaded, restarted service, and confirmed active/running with no post-activation missing-script/status=127 errors (verified using journal --since ActiveEnterTimestamp).
- Captured evidence in .ralph/evidence/ralph-event-watch-missing-script-path-20260303T114111Z (before/after status, cat, journal, marker checks, gate logs).
- Ran all required gates with stabilizers and all passed: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint. Marker grep files for make test and make lint recorded NO_MATCH.
- Updated task file acceptance/status tags to done/true/<passing>true</passing>, ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh, and added AGENTS.md learning about %h systemd paths + since-active journal verification.
- Next immediate step is stage everything, commit with required message/evidence summary, push, and stop.
